segments.text: LYNDA:SARA, I've heard that you want to move into a homestay family.
segments.translation: 琳达：萨拉，我听说你想搬进住宿家庭，

segments.text: Is that correct?
segments.translation: 这是真的吗？

segments.text: SARA:Yes, that's right.
segments.translation: 萨拉：没错。

segments.text: I've been staying with my aunt and now my cousin is arriving from Singapore and my aunt needs the room for him.
segments.translation: 我一直和我姑姑一起住，现在我表弟从新加坡回来了，我姑姑需要给他准备一个房间。

segments.text: LYNDA:Oh, that's bad luck.
segments.translation: 琳达：哦，运气不太好。

segments.text: Well, I'll need to get some particulars first.
segments.translation: 那么我首先需要了解一些情况。

segments.text: SARA, what's your full name?
segments.translation: 萨拉，你的全名是什么？

segments.text: SARA:SARA Lim, and that's SARA without the 'h' at the end.
segments.translation: 萨拉：萨拉·林穆，萨拉的结尾没有h。

segments.text: LYNDA:Mmm.
segments.translation: 琳达：嗯。

segments.text: How old are you.
segments.translation: 你多大了。

segments.text: SARA?
segments.translation: 莎拉？

segments.text: SARA:Twenty-three, only just.
segments.translation: 萨拉：刚刚好23。

segments.text: It was my birthday on the twenty-first of August.
segments.translation: 8月21日是我的生日。

segments.text: LYNDA:Happy birthday for yesterday.
segments.translation: 琳达：祝你昨天生日快乐。

segments.text: How long have you been in Australia?
segments.translation: 你来澳大利亚多久了？

segments.text: SARA:A year in Adelaide and six months in Sydney.
segments.translation: 萨拉：我在阿德莱德待了一年，悉尼待了六个月。

segments.text: I prefer Sydney, I've got more friends here.
segments.translation: 我更喜欢悉尼，我有更多的朋友在这里。

segments.text: LYNDA:What's your address at your aunts house?
segments.translation: 琳达：你姑姑家的地址是什么？

segments.text: SARA:Flat one, five three nine Forest Road, Canterbury.
segments.translation: 萨拉：坎特伯雷，福雷斯特路539号，1号公寓，

segments.text: And the post code is two, o, three, six.
segments.translation: 邮政编码是2036。

segments.text: LYNDA:OK.
segments.translation: 琳达：好。

segments.text: What are you studying now?
segments.translation: 你现在正在学习什么？

segments.text: SARA:I was studying General English in Adelaide and now I'm doing Academic English, because I'm trying to get into Medicine next year.
segments.translation: 萨拉：我曾经在阿德莱德学习通用英语。现在我正在学习学术性英语，因为我明年想学医。

segments.text: LYNDA:That sounds good, but it'll take you a long time.
segments.translation: 琳达：听起来不错，但它会花费你很长的时间。

segments.text: When would you like to move out from your aunt's?
segments.translation: 你想什么时候从你姑姑家搬走？

segments.text: SARA:My cousin arrives on Friday morning, so I'd better be out on Thursday.
segments.translation: 萨拉：我表弟周五早上回来。所以我最好周四就搬走。

segments.text: LYNDA:What, the seventh of September?
segments.translation: 琳达：什么，九月七日？

segments.text: SARA:Yes, that's right.
segments.translation: 萨拉：是的，没错。

segments.text: LYNDA:That doesn't leave us much time.
segments.translation: 琳达：没剩下多少时间了。

segments.text: Right.
segments.translation: 是的。

segments.text: OK.
segments.translation: 好吧。

segments.text: I need to know what kind of accommodation you'd like, so I can get you something suitable.
segments.translation: 我想知道你喜欢什么样的住处，这样我好给你找到适合的房子。

segments.text: SARA:Can I share a room with someone else?
segments.translation: 萨拉：我能和别人合住吗？

segments.text: I've been alone in my room at my aunt's and I've always shared with my sister and I like that.
segments.translation: 在我姑姑家我是一个人住，但我总和我姐姐合住，我喜欢这样。

segments.text: LYNDA:Yes, fine.
segments.translation: 琳达：当然好。

segments.text: That'll save you money too.
segments.translation: 这样也能帮你省钱。

segments.text: Would you like to live with a family or do you think that a single person would be better for you?
segments.translation: 你想和一个家庭合住还是觉得单身人士适合你。

segments.text: I have lots of very nice single people on my books.
segments.translation: 我的本上记载着许多不错的单身人士。

segments.text: SARA:Do you have any women living alone, retired women?
segments.translation: 萨拉：你那里有单独居住的退休女士吗？

segments.text: LYNDA:Yes.
segments.translation: 琳达：有。

segments.text: I have quite a few whose children have grown up and left home.
segments.translation: 我这里有几个，她们的孩子都长大成人离家了。

segments.text: In fact, I have some really lovely retired ladies, living by themselves, who just love the company of students.
segments.translation: 事实上，我这里有一些很和善的独居退休女士，她们喜欢有学生的陪伴。

segments.text: Most of them live in flats, but that's not a problem for you, is it?
segments.translation: 她们多数住在公寓里，不过这个对你不是问题吧？

segments.text: SARA:Not at all.
segments.translation: 萨拉：没关系。

segments.text: I'm used to that.
segments.translation: 我已经习惯了。

segments.text: My aunt lives in a flat too, remember.
segments.translation: 我姑姑也是住在公寓里，记得吗？

segments.text: I'm not used to a big house with a garden, swimming pool, pets and all that.
segments.translation: 我对有花园、游泳池、宠物或这类东西的大房子不习惯。

segments.text: LYNDA:OK, fine.
segments.translation: 琳达：好的，

segments.text: I know quite a bit about what you want now.
segments.translation: 我现在差不多知道你想要什么样的了。

segments.text: I should let you know that your rent will be a hundred and sixty dollars per week.
segments.translation: 我该让你知道你的房租每周是160美元。

segments.text: You'll have to pay me three hundred and twenty dollars as a deposit before you move in.
segments.translation: 在你搬进去之前，你要付给我320美金的押金。

segments.text: The deposit is as insurance, in case you break something.
segments.translation: 押金是以防你弄坏一些东西。

segments.text: You'll need to pay monthly to me, by cash or cheque, I don't mind.
segments.translation: 你按月付款，我不介意是现金还是支票。

segments.text: You don't need to pay for gas, electricity or water, but you will need to pay your proportion of the phone bill.
segments.translation: 你不用付煤气费、电费和水费。但是你得付你那部分电话费。

segments.text: Most families do that on an honour system, but you'll have to wait and see.
segments.translation: 多数家庭用他们的信用制处理账单，不过你得等等看。

segments.text: SARA:Mmm.
segments.translation: 萨拉：嗯。

segments.text: LYNDA:Have you got any more questions for me?
segments.translation: 琳达：你有什么问题问我吗？

segments.text: SARA:When will you know where I can go?
segments.translation: 萨拉：什么时候你知道我能搬去哪儿？

segments.text: LYNDA:I'll work on it now, so come and see me tomorrow and I should have some news for you then.
segments.translation: 琳达：我现在就开始找。明天你再来看看，那时候我应该会有一些消息给你。

segments.text: SARA:Thanks a lot.
segments.translation: 萨拉：非常感谢。

segments.text: LYNDA:Goodbye.
segments.translation: 琳达：再见。

segments.text: See you tomorrow - after lunch would be better for me.
segments.translation: 明天见。最好午饭过后来找我

segments.text: SARA:OK , see you then.
segments.translation: 萨拉：好的，

segments.text: Bye.
segments.translation: 到时候见。
